source_name: Retail pump price - premium 95 multi-state average
notes: Multi-state premium 95 average weighted by station count. QLD: 910 stations, avg 199.4 c/L, source date 2026-05-31; WA: 524 stations, avg 185.4 c/L, source date 2026-07-13. NSW contributes only when NSW_FUELCHECK_API_KEY is configured.
source_rights: Mixed state government terms; verify each source before reuse
citation: NSW FuelCheck; Queensland Government Open Data Fuel Price Reporting; WA FuelWatch.

states.detail: Queensland Open Data premium 95 latest public monthly file: Queensland Fuel Prices May 2026
